title: Front Office Manager - Speciality Restaurants Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Speciality Restaurants Global Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants Global Group:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
